subcodes.title: Words to Percy Woodcock in 1909
subcodes.first_line: It is a great mistake to suppose that there will be a House of Justice established in each city. The fact is there will be but one House of Justice for the whole world... we are simply the servants building the house. The house is not ours. We simply contribute the labor.
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @means of establishment of future civilization, @elections
